chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D 526 of 2023: Muhammad Mithal Junejo vs. Mayor, Municipal Corporation Larkana & others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate. For Respondents: Mr. Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Additional Advocate General. Date of hearing: 15.05.2024. Date of order: 15.05.2024. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. The petition seeks placement / construction of speed breakers at a certain area within the municipal limits. Office objection denotes that the petition is devoid of any assertion that the concerned authority has ever been approached in such regard. No endeavor was even made to demonstrate any vested right of the petitioner to the relief sought. Petition being misconceived is hereby dismissed. Judge Judge
